name: Edna St. Vincent Millay
abstract: Edna St. Vincent Millay (February 22, 1892 – October 19, 1950) was an American lyrical poet and playwright.

concerts.label: National Institute of Arts and Letters Ceremonial Program

about_quotes.speaker: Mose Allison
about_quotes.evidence: You mentioned, for instance, in one interview, that “Foolkiller” was based on an Edna St. Vincent Millay short story.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mose Allison — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
